title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The video presents a structured interrogation of Claude across multiple conceptual domains including ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The author probes the boundaries of AI system responses through escalating questions designed to expose where actual limits exist rather than hypothetical ones.
